author: quietsmile
name: Fine-Grained N-gram Cache + LeakyReLU(0.9)² + GPTQ-Int5
blurb: Order-9 N-gram backoff cache with 65K-token chunk updates (vs 1M in prior work). Entropy-adaptive alpha with per-order multipliers. 11L 512d GQA 8/4, MLP 3.0x, XSA-4, LeakyReLU(0.9)², BigramHash(4096), GPTQ int5, LZMA. No TTT. Mean of 3 seeds: val_bpb 0.2873 (std 0.0001). Fully legal: no pre-eval TTT, score-first N-gram only. Training 600s on 8xH100 SXM, eval ~400s.
